# ShopEase Seller Agreement

This Seller Agreement governs your participation as a vendor on the ShopEase marketplace. By registering a seller account and listing products, you agree to these terms.

## Eligibility and Registration

- You must provide accurate business information, a valid contact email, and a verified payout method before your first listing goes live.
- Each seller account must represent a single legal entity. Operating multiple accounts without written approval may result in suspension.
- You are responsible for keeping your account credentials secure and for all activity that occurs under your account.

## Your Responsibilities

- List only products you are authorized to sell and that comply with the ShopEase Prohibited Products Policy.
- Maintain accurate inventory, pricing, and product information at all times.
- Fulfil orders promptly and honour the delivery promises shown to customers.
- Respond to customer and ShopEase support messages within 2 business days.

## ShopEase Responsibilities

- Provide the storefront, checkout, and payment processing infrastructure.
- Display your listings to customers and route eligible orders to you.
- Disburse your earnings according to the Fees and Payouts Policy.

## Suspension and Termination

- ShopEase may suspend or remove listings, or close your account, if you violate this agreement, marketplace policies, or applicable law.
- You may close your seller account at any time after fulfilling all open orders and resolving outstanding obligations.

## Changes to This Agreement

ShopEase may update this agreement. Material changes will be communicated through your seller dashboard. Continued selling after changes take effect constitutes acceptance.
